How to Invest:
You can invest in Groww Mutual Fund online by following some simple steps. Mentioned below is the process to invest in this mutual fund.
Step 1. Log-in to your Groww account to access the necessary information. If you are a new user, register your details to create an account.
Step 2. Upload a copy of your Identity Proof, like Voter ID, Aadhaar, PAN Card, passport, Driving Licence, etc. It should be a document issued by the Central or State Government.
Step 3. Upload a Proof of Address document. It can be any identity proof document with your permanent address mentioned.
Step 4. Choose an appropriate investment period for the scheme.
Step 5. Select whether you want to invest in a low, medium, or high-risk scheme.
Step 6. Set your preferred mutual fund as Groww Mutual Funds.
Step 7. Select “Invest One Time” if you want to invest a large amount; select “Start SIP” if you want to invest the amount via SIP.
The Groww Mutual Fund online investment will reflect in your Groww account within 3 to 4 business days after the completion of the process.
